qa_pair.question: What is the FastMCP server name registered in x-change’s stdio MCP module?
Which environment variable selects the SQLite file for x-change MCP tools?
What is the default database filename if XCHANGE_DB_PATH is unset?
Which MCP tool lists rows from the support_signals exception queue?
Which MCP tool returns aggregate reward_ledger counts grouped by lifecycle state?
Which MCP tool returns one reward’s ledger row plus linked evidence and payment summaries?
What JSON key does read_reward_state use when reward_id is missing from the ledger?
What string value pairs with the error key when a reward_id is not found?
Which payment_confirmations field is intentionally omitted from xchange_list_payment_confirmations rows?
What is the maximum page size (limit) enforced by mcp_read.clamp_limit?
